hero.title: Trustify
hero.subtitle: AI Digital Safety Assistant
hero.desc: Helping Indonesian society detect scams, phishing, hoaxes, and digital manipulation before becoming victims.

problems.title: Digital Threats in Indonesia
problems.desc: Millions of Indonesians fall victim to digital fraud every year.
problems.phishing_desc: Fake emails & messages stealing personal data
problems.scam_desc: Money transfers to scammers on marketplaces
problems.fake_jobs_desc: Fake recruitments demanding fees or data
problems.fake_reviews_desc: Ratings created by bots to manipulate buyers
problems.pinjol_desc: Illegal online loans with suffocating interest
problems.hoax_desc: Fake information spreading on WhatsApp & social media

why.title: Why Trustify?
why.desc: Your AI security companion for daily digital protection.
why.ai_detection_desc: Detect fraud patterns using artificial intelligence

features.title: Complete Protection Features
features.desc: A complete digital security ecosystem in one application.
features.scamshield_desc: Check suspicious accounts, phone numbers, and links
features.hoaxlens_desc: Detect hoax news and fake broadcasts

trends.title: Hot Scam Trends
trends.desc: Stay aware of the latest scam methods making the rounds.

dashboard.subtitle: Stay safe in the digital world. Check today's threats.
dashboard.search_placeholder: Enter bank account, phone number, URL, or suspicious text...
dashboard.no_scans: No scans yet. Start checking now!

upload.title: Upload File
upload.desc: Drag & drop or click to select a file

chat.title: Trustify Support
chat.greeting: Hello! How can I help you with your digital safety today?

footer.tagline: Protecting Indonesian society in the digital age.
